all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
Thou shalt not avenge, nor bear any grudge against the children of thy people, but thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself: I am the Lord.
Leviticus 19:18
Quote of the Day
"The Lord proves us … to strengthen us. That proving … comes in moments when we feel stretched beyond what we thought we could bear."
President Henry B. Eyring | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
